results.title: PDF Q Blade-Based Simulation of a 7° Tapered Wind Turbine Blade Employing ...
results.snippet: The wind turbine blade model was designed using a tapered blade configuration to optimize the aerodynamic performance along the span. The airfoil type selected was NACA 4412, which is known for its good lift-to-drag ratio and stability at low Reynolds numbers.
